description: Maniac Panic Log Analyser — final commercial technician-grade database generated from FULL_FINAL_IPHONE_PANIC_DATABASE_2026 workbook. Model-wise codes with hex/decimal/binary/keyword aliases, causes and repair actions.

0x80000.part: Front Top Screen Flex / Proximity / ALS

0xc0000.combined_logic: 0x80000 + 0x40000 = 0xc0000 in reference wording; verify nearby panic text

causes: board communication issue near charging/data circuit
repair_actions: check charging port first if Mic1/Prs0 nearby
check power flex if Mic2 nearby
use nearby panic text to decide
0x100000.notes: Ambiguous: appears under both Charge Port and Power Flex in reference.

causes: board communication issue near charging/data circuit
repair_actions: check charge port, power button flex, and prox/front flex

causes: wireless charging flex/back glass assembly issue
repair_actions: check front/prox flex and wireless charging flex
decide using model and nearby panic text
